overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a sci-fi aircraft flying over snow-covered mountains toward a massive orbital station. The video game footage features a futuristic HUD, dynamic banking maneuvers, and a pilot's hand visible on the controls during turns, set in a cold, overcast alpine environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley approaching orbital station

agents.ego_description: piloting the aircraft straight toward the distant orbital station

entered.detail: massive futuristic space station with glowing orange lights hovering above the mountains
snow-covered mountain peaks extending to the horizon
snow-covered mountain peaks extending to the horizon
snow-covered ground passing below the aircraft

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying through a snowy mountain valley. The massive orbital station looms in the distance ahead, while snow-covered peaks flank both sides. The aircraft maintains steady forward flight over the white terrain under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge during left bank maneuver

events.description: begins sharp left bank, pilot's gloved hand becomes visible gripping the control stick

agents.ego_description: executing a left bank maneuver while gripping the control stick, revealing the pilot's arm and gloved hand

segments.scene_description: The aircraft initiates a sharp left turn, bringing the snow-covered mountains into the center of the view while the orbital station moves out of sight to the right. The pilot's gloved hand is visible on the control stick during the maneuver, and the terrain rushes by below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain peaks during course correction

events.description: begins right turn to reorient toward the orbital station

agents.ego_description: banking right to turn back toward the orbital station while flying over the mountain peaks

entered.detail: massive futuristic space station with glowing orange lights reappearing ahead

segments.scene_description: Flying over the snow-covered mountain ridges, the aircraft begins a right turn to reorient toward the orbital station. The station comes back into view ahead as the mountains shift to the left side of the frame, with the pilot adjusting course through the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach to orbital station over snowy plains

agents.ego_description: flying steadily toward the orbital station with minor course corrections over the expansive snow field

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows steady flight toward the orbital station, which remains centered in the distance. The aircraft flies over vast snow-covered plains and rolling white hills, maintaining a stabilized approach under the grey overcast sky until the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as a sci-fi aircraft navigates a snowy mountain range toward a distant orbital station. It begins with a steady flight through a deep valley, where snow-covered peaks flank the view and the massive station looms on the horizon under an overcast sky. As the aircraft initiates a sharp left turn, the station disappears from sight and the pilot's gloved hand becomes visible on the control stick while the white terrain rushes by. The scene then shifts as the aircraft banks right to reorient, bringing the orbital station back into center view while the mountain ridges slide toward the left of the frame. Finally, the flight stabilizes over vast snow-covered plains and rolling white hills, maintaining a direct and steady approach toward the station beneath the grey sky.
